extension.description: Official Streamlink repacked for Kodi Omega
extension.news: 8.2.0+omega.1 - Streamlink updated to official 8.2.0 package - Kodi Omega: removed deprecated external addon imports from addon.xml - keeps module structure unchanged 2.3.0 - major release, please see changelog 2.1.1 - patch release 2.1.0 - please see changelog 2.0.0 - drop py2 support, see changelog 1.7.0 - please refer to changelog 1.3.1.12 - Python 3 Matrix Nighlty compatibility 1.3.1.11 - Streamlink 1.3.1.11 - Python3 issues on Kodi 1.3.0 - Streamlink 1.3.0 with CLI folder
